headline: Conagra Brands to Expand Manufacturing Operations in Fayetteville, Arkansas
summary: Approximately $220 million investment will add new production capacity and create more than 100 jobs over five yearsFAYETTEVILLE, Ark., March 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, the Arkansas Economic Development Commission announced that Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG), one of North America’s leading branded food companies, will expand its existing manufacturing facility in Fayetteville, Ark. through a multi-year investment of approximately $220 million.
